description: {"description": "Leaf exhibits irregular chlorosis and potential necrosis. Texture appears slightly rough or granular in affected areas. Leaf margin is generally intact, though some distortion is present due to discoloration."} {"description": "Lesions are characterized by a mottled yellow to orange discoloration, transitioning to brown in some areas. No distinct lesion borders are visible; the discoloration is diffuse. Possible presence of a powdery or granular substance on the leaf surface, potentially fungal spores or hyphal growth."} Symptoms are not uniformly distributed. Chlorosis and necrosis are concentrated on the upper leaf surface, particularly along the veins and interveinal spaces. Distribution appears somewhat random, but with a tendency to follow vein patterns. Lower portion of the leaf appears less affected.
